member.name: T:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient
member.summary: Primary entry point for interacting with the Fiscalo API from .NET applications.

member.name: F:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.DefaultBaseUrl
member.summary: Default production base URL for the Fiscalo API.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new Fiscalo client using the provided API key and optional transport settings.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.#ctor(Fiscalo.Sdk.Configuration.FiscaloOptions,System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new Fiscalo client from a structured options object.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Fiscalo.Sdk.Configuration.FiscaloOptions,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new Fiscalo client using an externally managed .

member.name: P:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.ApiKey
member.summary: API key used for authenticated requests.

member.name: P:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.BaseUrl
member.summary: Normalized API base URL used by the SDK.

member.name: P:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.Timeout
member.summary: Effective request timeout for outbound API calls.

member.name: P:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.HttpClient
member.summary: Low-level HTTP transport used by the SDK.

member.name: P:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.Customers
member.summary: Customer endpoints for create, read, list and update operations.

member.name: P:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.Items
member.summary: Item endpoints for catalog and pricing operations.

member.name: P:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.DocumentSeries
member.summary: Document series endpoints for issuing configuration.

member.name: P:Fiscalo.Sdk.FiscaloClient.Documents
member.summary: Document endpoints for creation, issuing and PDF generation workflows.

member.name: T:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.CustomersResource
member.summary: Provides access to Fiscalo customer endpoints.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.CustomersResource.#ctor(Fiscalo.Sdk.Support.FiscaloHttpClient)
member.summary: Creates a customer resource wrapper over the shared Fiscalo transport.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.CustomersResource.ListAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists customers available in the current Fiscalo environment.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.CustomersResource.CreateAsync(Fiscalo.Sdk.Models.CreateCustomerRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new customer in Fiscalo.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.CustomersResource.GetAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a single customer by identifier.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.CustomersResource.UpdateAsync(System.String,Fiscalo.Sdk.Models.UpdateCustomerRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies a partial update to an existing customer.

member.name: T:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentSeriesResource
member.summary: Provides access to Fiscalo document series endpoints.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentSeriesResource.#ctor(Fiscalo.Sdk.Support.FiscaloHttpClient)
member.summary: Creates a document series resource wrapper over the shared Fiscalo transport.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentSeriesResource.ListAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists document series available in the current Fiscalo environment.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentSeriesResource.CreateAsync(Fiscalo.Sdk.Models.CreateDocumentSeriesRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new document series in Fiscalo.

member.name: T:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentsResource
member.summary: Provides access to Fiscalo document creation, issuing and PDF endpoints.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentsResource.#ctor(Fiscalo.Sdk.Support.FiscaloHttpClient)
member.summary: Creates a document resource wrapper over the shared Fiscalo transport.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentsResource.ListAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists documents available in the current Fiscalo environment.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentsResource.CreateAsync(Fiscalo.Sdk.Models.CreateDocumentRequest,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new draft document.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentsResource.GetAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a single document by identifier.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentsResource.AddLineAsync(System.String,Fiscalo.Sdk.Models.CreateDocumentLineRequest,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new line to an existing draft document.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentsResource.IssueAsync(System.String,Fiscalo.Sdk.Models.IssueDocumentRequest,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Issues a draft document and locks its fiscal data.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentsResource.GeneratePdfAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests Fiscalo to generate the PDF representation for a document.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.DocumentsResource.GetPdfAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads the generated PDF bytes for a document.

member.name: T:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.ItemsResource
member.summary: Provides access to Fiscalo item endpoints.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.ItemsResource.#ctor(Fiscalo.Sdk.Support.FiscaloHttpClient)
member.summary: Creates an item resource wrapper over the shared Fiscalo transport.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.ItemsResource.ListAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists items available in the current Fiscalo environment.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.ItemsResource.CreateAsync(Fiscalo.Sdk.Models.CreateItemRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new item in Fiscalo.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.ItemsResource.GetAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a single item by identifier.

member.name: M:Fiscalo.Sdk.Resources.ItemsResource.UpdateAsync(System.String,Fiscalo.Sdk.Models.UpdateItemRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies a partial update to an existing item.
